data.body:
My first time as a hospital Cook was in Tas. (Burnie 40+yrs ago)
The older Kitchen Assistants would knit at lunch time.
It looked so relaxing, I asked to be taught.

I knitted a simple jumper that was too heavy & hot to wear.
The women laughed at my "tongue out", tight stitch, knitting style! 🤣
